scripts.test:smoke: E2E_RUNNER_ACTION=${E2E_RUNNER_ACTION:-kill} PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 bash ../scripts/e2e-playwright.sh host ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test --project=chromium tests/smoke-public.spec.ts tests/public-website.spec.ts
scripts.test:docker:ci: bash ../scripts/e2e-playwright.sh docker ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test --project=chromium --project=firefox --project=webkit --grep-invert "Dark Mode Accessibility Audit" && npm run test:docker:ci:mobile
scripts.test:docker:ci:mobile: CI=1 bash ../scripts/e2e-playwright.sh docker ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test --project="Mobile Chrome" tests/ux-regression.spec.ts --grep "mobile navigation drawer keeps the compact section layout|mobile auth entry routes keep forms above the fold|mobile staff routes use compact cards and avoid horizontal overflow"
scripts.test:ci:mobile: CI=1 bash ../scripts/e2e-playwright.sh host ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test --project="Mobile Chrome" tests/ux-regression.spec.ts --grep "mobile navigation drawer keeps the compact section layout|mobile auth entry routes keep forms above the fold|mobile staff routes use compact cards and avoid horizontal overflow"
scripts.test:ci: CI=1 bash ../scripts/e2e-playwright.sh host ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test --project=chromium --project=firefox --project=webkit --grep-invert "Dark Mode Accessibility Audit" && npm run test:ci:mobile
